# Christoph Kieser

> Automation & Systems Engineer based in Zürich, Switzerland. 10+ years building scalable, reliable Linux infrastructure — primarily in the financial industry.

## Identity

- Full name: Christoph Kieser
- Location: Zürich, Switzerland
- Email: mail@christophkieser.ch
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ckieser
- Website: https://christophkieser.ch
- Certification ID (Red Hat): 160-209-045

## Current Role

System Engineer Automation at SIX (January 2024 – present)
- Develops Terraform/OpenTofu modules for on-premises infrastructure
- Piloted Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and Configuration as Code (CaC) adoption at SIX
- Establishes automation standards and contributes to architecture reviews
- Integrates DevOps best practices across development and operations teams

## Career History

- SIX — Linux System Engineer (Sep 2019 – Jan 2024, Zürich)
- SWITCH — System Engineer (Mar 2016 – Aug 2019, Zürich)
- btnet GmbH — Junior System Engineer (Jan 2011 – Apr 2012, Zürich)

## Core Skills

Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, OpenTofu, HCL, GitOps, module and provider development
Configuration Management: Ansible, Ansible Automation Platform (AAP), SaltStack
Operating Systems: Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL), Red Hat Satellite, OS lifecycle management
Containers & Virtualisation: OpenShift, Podman, Docker, Red Hat Virtualisation, Cisco UCS
Scripting: Python, Bash, YAML, Jinja2
Practices: DevOps, CI/CD, ITIL, architecture review, technical documentation

## Active Certifications

- Red Hat Certified OpenShift Application Developer — valid Aug 2025 – Aug 2028
- Red Hat Certified Engineer (RHCE) — valid Feb 2019 – Aug 2028
- Red Hat Certified System Administrator (RHCSA) — valid Feb 2019 – Aug 2028
- DevOps Foundation (DevOps Institute) — valid Apr 2024 – Apr 2027
